headline: Comedy Phenomenon 'Celebrity Autobiography' Crashes Broadway's Party
lede: Eugene Pack's viral comedy sensation transforms celebrity tell-alls into comedic gold, landing a prime Broadway slot with a star-studded rotating cast.
body:
## A Comedy Revolution Hits Broadway

The comedy world has a new theatrical disruptor: 'Celebrity Autobiography' is set to transform the Broadway landscape with its wickedly sharp take on Hollywood's most self-important memoirs. Created by comedy mastermind Eugene Pack, the show transforms celebrity autobiographies into uproarious performance art, featuring bold-faced names reading the unintentionally hilarious personal narratives of their fellow stars.

## Star Power Meets Comic Genius

Headlining the inaugural Broadway run are comedy titans Kenan Thompson, Andrea Martin, and Kathy Griffin, who will rotate through performances at the historic Shubert Theatre. The show's premise is deceptively simple: actors read verbatim passages from celebrity memoirs, revealing the often unintentional comedy lurking within supposedly serious personal narratives.

## A Cultural Phenomenon Takes Flight

Previews commence May 16, with the official opening night scheduled for May 18, effectively launching the 2026-2027 Broadway season. The production represents a unique intersection of comedy, performance art, and cultural critique, offering audiences an irreverent peek behind the carefully curated personas of Hollywood's elite.
key_facts: Rotating cast includes Kenan Thompson, Andrea Martin, Kathy Griffin
Created by comedy writer Eugene Pack
